dbc88bc8.name: llamacppqwen35a3buncensored
dbc88bc8.description: Qwen3.5 35B MoE (3B active) uncensored model via llama.cpp — optimized for Olares One
dbc88bc8.title: Qwen35 35B-A3B Uncensored
dbc88bc8.fullDescription:
Qwen3.5-35B-A3B Uncensored (HauhauCS Aggressive) served via llama.cpp, optimized for Olares One hardware.

MoE architecture with 128 experts, 8 active per token (~3B active parameters).
Q4_K_M quantization (21.2GB). Full GPU offload on RTX 5090M (24GB VRAM).
16K context window. OpenAI-compatible API on port 8080.

Expected performance: ~200 tokens/sec. Model downloads automatically on first launch (~21.2GB).

Qwen3.5-35B-A3B Uncensored (HauhauCS Aggressive) served via llama.cpp, optimized for Olares One hardware.

MoE architecture with 128 experts, 8 active per token (~3B active parameters).
Q4_K_M quantization (21.2GB). Full GPU offload on RTX 5090M (24GB VRAM).

metadata.title: Qwen3.5 35B-A3B 无审查版
metadata.description: 通过 llama.cpp 提供 Qwen3.5 35B MoE（3B 活跃参数）无审查模型 — 针对 Olares One 优化

spec.fullDescription:
Qwen3.5-35B-A3B 无审查版（HauhauCS Aggressive）通过 llama.cpp 提供服务，针对 Olares One 硬件优化。

MoE 架构，128 个专家，每个 token 激活 8 个（约 3B 活跃参数）。
Q4_K_M 量化（21.2GB）。RTX 5090M（24GB 显存）全 GPU 卸载。
16K 上下文窗口。端口 8080 提供 OpenAI 兼容 API。

预期性能：约 200 tokens/秒。首次启动时自动下载模型（约 21.2GB）。

8c63f603.name: llamacppqwen3coder30ba3b
8c63f603.description: Qwen3 Coder 30B-A3B Instruct agentic coding model via llama.cpp — optimized for Olares One
8c63f603.title: Qwen3 Coder 30B-A3B
8c63f603.fullDescription:
Qwen3-Coder-30B-A3B-Instruct served via llama.cpp, optimized for Olares One hardware.

Agentic coding model with superior code generation, tool-calling, and repository-scale understanding.
MoE architecture with 128 experts, 8 active per token (~3.3B active parameters).
Q4_K_M quantization (18.6GB). Full GPU offload on RTX 5090M (24GB VRAM).
64K context window. OpenAI-compatible API on port 8080.

Expected performance: ~200 tokens/sec. Model downloads automatically on first launch (~18.6GB).

metadata.title: Qwen3 Coder 30B-A3B
metadata.description: Qwen3 Coder 30B-A3B Instruct 智能编程模型通过 llama.cpp 提供服务 — 针对 Olares One 优化

spec.fullDescription:
Qwen3-Coder-30B-A3B-Instruct 通过 llama.cpp 提供服务，针对 Olares One 硬件优化。

智能编程模型，具备卓越的代码生成、工具调用和仓库级代码理解能力。
MoE 架构，128 个专家，每个 token 激活 8 个（约 3.3B 活跃参数）。
Q4_K_M 量化（18.6GB）。RTX 5090M（24GB 显存）全 GPU 卸载。
64K 上下文窗口。端口 8080 提供 OpenAI 兼容 API。

预期性能：约 200 tokens/秒。首次启动时自动下载模型（约 18.6GB）。

ae235064.name: vllmqwen3coder30ba3bfp4
ae235064.description: Qwen3 Coder 30B-A3B Instruct NVFP4 quantized model via vLLM — optimized for Olares One
ae235064.title: Qwen3 Coder 30B-A3B FP4 vLLM
ae235064.fullDescription:
Qwen3-Coder-30B-A3B-Instruct served via vLLM with NVFP4 quantization (4-bit weights and activations),
optimized for Olares One hardware (RTX 5090M 24GB VRAM).

MoE architecture with 128 experts, 8 active per token (~3B active parameters).
NVFP4 quantization (18.1GB). Full GPU inference on RTX 5090M.
65K context window. OpenAI-compatible API on port 8000.

Expected performance: ~200+ tokens/sec. Model downloads automatically on first launch (~18.1GB).

metadata.title: Qwen3 Coder 30B-A3B FP4 vLLM
metadata.description: Qwen3 Coder 30B-A3B Instruct NVFP4 quantized model via vLLM — optimized for Olares One

spec.fullDescription:
Qwen3-Coder-30B-A3B-Instruct served via vLLM with NVFP4 quantization (4-bit weights and activations),
optimized for Olares One hardware (RTX 5090M 24GB VRAM).

MoE architecture with 128 experts, 8 active per token (~3B active parameters).
NVFP4 quantization (18.1GB). Full GPU inference on RTX 5090M.
65K context window. OpenAI-compatible API on port 8000.

Features:
- Agentic coding capabilities with tool calling support
- Thinking/reasoning mode with structured output
- OpenAI-compatible API endpoint
- Automatic model download on first launch (~18.1GB)

Expected performance: ~200+ tokens/sec.

metadata.title: Qwen3 Coder 30B-A3B FP4 vLLM
metadata.description: Qwen3 Coder 30B-A3B Instruct NVFP4 量化模型，通过 vLLM 提供服务 — 针对 Olares One 优化

spec.fullDescription:
Qwen3-Coder-30B-A3B-Instruct 通过 vLLM 提供服务，采用 NVFP4 量化（4位权重和激活），
针对 Olares One 硬件优化（RTX 5090M 24GB 显存）。

MoE 架构，128 个专家，每个 token 激活 8 个（约 3B 活跃参数）。
NVFP4 量化（18.1GB）。在 RTX 5090M 上全 GPU 推理。
65K 上下文窗口。端口 8000 上提供 OpenAI 兼容 API。

特性：
- 代理编码能力，支持工具调用
- 思维/推理模式，支持结构化输出
- OpenAI 兼容 API 端点
- 首次启动自动下载模型（约 18.1GB）

预期性能：约 200+ tokens/秒。
